text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: All right! I did it! Did you see that, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I gave it everything I've got... It seems I did pretty
well!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I gave it everything I've got... It seems I did pretty
well!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Thank you so much! Hearing such high praise
from you is a reward in and of itself!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Next time, I'll do even better! That's a
promise!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I will! I'm headed straight for my dream!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It's so close, I feel like I can practically
reach out and touch it.
